channel.title: Orchestration on The Agency
channel.description: Recent content in Orchestration on The Agency

item.title: Autonomous agents need a foreman
item.description: One-shot multi-phase Claude Code gave me fast code and expensive cleanup; phased discuss → plan → execute → verify, plus atomic commits, is what made autonomy survivable.

item.title: Run a full project with GSD
item.description: Helps you run a multi-phase project in Claude Code with GSD: /gsd:new-project through ship, atomic commits, verification gates, and .planning/ you can resume after a reset.
